statement: In every magma, Equation 1421 (`x = y * (((z * w) * u) * y)`) implies Equation 3633 (`x * y = z * ((w * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0854
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) u) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op w x) x))
